## Security / privacy checklist

- [ ] No real secrets, tokens, bootstrap links, private keys, or private device identifiers are committed.
- [ ] Secret/sudo/approval flows still redact sensitive values.
- [ ] User-facing logs, transcripts, exports, and docs do not expose secrets.
- [ ] Gateway auth, deep-link, APNs, or physical-device changes are called out above, if touched.
